entry.title: Major service outage (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — The platform-wide outage has cleared. Any remaining component issues are tracked individually.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that multiple services are affected (Application API, Authentication & SSO, Social Feed, HR & Organization, Notifications & Email, Database). Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Database degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Database has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Database is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Notifications & Email degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Notifications & Email has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Notifications & Email is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: HR & Organization degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — HR & Organization has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that HR & Organization is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Social Feed degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Social Feed has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Social Feed is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Authentication & SSO degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Authentication & SSO has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Authentication & SSO is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Application API outage (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Application API has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Application API is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
